data.title: Shell Profit Rises as Iran War Boosts Oil Price and Trading
data.description: Shell Plc reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings as the Iran war boosted trading profits and drove up energy prices, helping it to overcome a drop in oil and gas production from the conflict.
data.keywords: SHELL PLC,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,War,Iran,Gas Prices,Earnings,ARC RESOURCES LTD,VITOL GROUP/THE,Capital Spending,Chief Executive Officer,industries,markets
